description_long: This is a modern, single-story house set on a large rectangular plot with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior features a combination of white and wood-paneled walls, with large glass windows and sliding doors that open to a private backyard and patio area. The front of the house includes a paved driveway leading to a garage, and the property is bordered by a low wall and rows of evenly spaced trees. The backyard is landscaped with grass, trees, and a patio furnished for outdoor living. The house has a minimalist aesthetic, with an emphasis on open spaces and natural light. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white and wood-paneled exterior, large windows, and landscaped yard. Features include a driveway, garage, and private backyard patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and a row of trees along the property edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard patio, large glass windows, and landscaped garden area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio furniture, and the full length of the house with wood and white paneling.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, additional trees, and the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flush door, no steps, and a paved approach integrated with the driveway
